segments.label: hook-bounce-failed
segments.title: The S&P Sold Its Bounce in One Bar
segments.copy:
Oil touched ninety-one and gave it back. The S&P sold its bounce to close within three points of the low. The pressure is coming from rates. Full session breakdown on the channel. #stockmarket #sp500 #oil #markets #FinTok

segments.label: spx-19-points
segments.title: The S&P Is 19 Points From Breaking July
segments.copy:
The S&P closed nineteen points above its July low at 7,421. Two closes below the 7,504 line, with yields pressing their July high. Levels to watch Tuesday, read off the settled bars. #sp500 #stockmarket #trading #markets #FinTok

Research tooling, not financial advice. No performance is promised or implied.
